items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg says the players he watches most are Paolo Banchero, Naz Neid, LeBron James and Magic Johnson
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Yaxel Lendeborg says the players he watches most are Paolo Banchero, Naz Neid, LeBron James and Magic Johnson 

I asked about if he like his Dominican LeBron nickname: "I do. I really do. It was really fun trying to keep that legacy."

items.title: [Deveney] The expectation is that the Magic will waive Jonathan Isaac and stretch his $8 million cap hit… the Magic are facing a cash crunch with Paolo Banchero's extension kicking in.
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: Another player who can probably be crossed off the trade list is Magic forward Jonathan Isaac, whose $14.5 million deal is only guaranteed at $8 million. He would make good potential trade ballast, but the Magic are facing a cash crunch with Paolo Banchero’s extension kicking…
